summary: Completed testing of iteration 3 new features: color scheme change, notification preferences, bulk user actions, and CSV export. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success), but found frontend integration issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Login button still uses blue color instead of teal (#114f55)
Admin users are redirected to user dashboard instead of admin dashboard

integration_issues.issue: Admin users cannot access admin dashboard with bulk actions and CSV export
Cannot test notification preferences due to dashboard access issues

design_issues.details: Teal color (#114f55) implemented in some components but not others

passed_tests: Backend API: User registration and login
Backend API: Admin bulk role update
Backend API: Steps, partners, CMS endpoints
Frontend: Landing page loads with teal color scheme
Frontend: Teal color scheme in main buttons and accents

critical_fixes: Fix admin dashboard routing - admin users should access /admin dashboard with Users tab, bulk actions, and CSV export
Fix user registration form validation to allow successful account creation
Complete color scheme migration - update login button and other blue elements to use teal (#114f55)
testing_needed: Test admin dashboard Users tab with checkboxes and bulk actions
Test CSV export functionality from admin dashboard
Test user notification preferences panel with gear icon and toggles
Verify all UI elements use consistent teal/green color scheme
